title: 725-1426 Starter Solenoid 12V for MTD 925-1426A 925-1426 925-0771 725-1426 725-1426A 725-0771 for Toro 112-0309 334009B 435-065 Replacement for Lawn Mower,80Amp Starter Relay Solenoid
features: Specifications: 3 Post Slide Connector Terminal 1/4inch Diameter Bolt 50% Duty, 80 Amp Capacity
925-1426A Starter Solenoid Fits for MTD front and rear engine rider models 1990-1994
High Quality: Made of high-quality materials, it is durable, corrosion-resistant, and not easily deformed or damaged, ensuring stable performance, safety, and a long service life.
Wide Applications: Widely suitable for small gasoline engines, such as motorcycles, ATVs, cars, off-road vehicles, small tractors, lawn mowers, snowmobiles, gardening equipment, karts, etc.
Package includes: 1pcs 725-1426 Solenoid Starter Relay,2pcs Terminal Blocks
Note: Please Check Pictures and Dimensions Carefully for Compatibility Before Your Purchasing
description: for MTD Front & Rear Engine Rider Models 1990 thru 1994 Replaces the following OEM numbers： Replaces for MTD 925-1426, 925-1426A, 9251426A, 725-1426A, 725-0771, 925-0771, 25-1426, 1751569, for Stens 435-065 for AYP 110832X for Toro 112-0309 for Snapper 18817, 1-8817, 75671, 7075671, 7075671YP for Husqvarna 532110832, 725-0530 725-1426P 334009B 1717048 1726547 1740056 4124 539115774 539115788 532109946 532138406 677A880 7754R Package includes: 1pcs 725-1426 Solenoid Starter Relay 2pcs Terminal Blocks
